drone_supply_chain_role.notes: RCV makes small UAV ICE engines and ECUs — components integrated into UAV platforms by OEM customers. Site explicitly states engines are 'designed as a UAV engine not modified from a hobby engine'. Does not manufacture complete UAVs.

readiness.notes: Catalog SKUs (DF35, DF70, DF70LC, EFI ECU) published with full specifications, TBO figures, and downloadable product flyers. Engineering development/licensing service also offered as a secondary capability.

tagline: UK-based manufacturer of 4-stroke rotary-valve UAV engines (DF70LC, DF70, DF35 series) running on heavy fuels, plus electronic fuel injection controllers with altitude compensation. Production-ready across multiple displacements and cooling variants. Also serves hybrid platforms and generator systems. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; limited public evidence of US defense program adoption beyond a SeaLandAire testimonial reference to an "ADARO program."
